successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave-management/leave-management.service.ts exists and exports LeaveManagementService class implementing ILeaveManagementService.

tests/unit/modules/leave-management/leave-management.service.test.ts exists and contains Jest unit tests for applyForLeave method covering success, validation errors, missing policy, insufficient balance, and transaction rollback.

applyForLeave method validates leave policy via ILeavePolicyRepository, checks balance via IBalanceRepository, creates LeaveRequest with status DRAFT, transitions to SUBMITTED, and logs audit via IAuditLogRepository.

All database operations within applyForLeave (create, update status, audit log) are executed within a single database transaction using a client obtained from the injected Pool, with commit on success and rollback on error.
Input validation is performed on the CreateLeaveRequestDto fields (employeeId, leaveTypeId, startDate, endDate) before processing, throwing a ValidationError if invalid.
The service class implements all methods of ILeaveManagementService; methods other than applyForLeave throw NotImplementedError to indicate they are not yet implemented.

constraints: GP-001: Repository pattern - All database access goes through repository interfaces.
GP-002: Audit records - All state-changing operations write an audit record.
GP-003: Input validation - Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
GP-006: Error handling - No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
